scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields matching gold standard (name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources) plus extensive optional fields. Structure and values are accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issue: platforms sub-keys 'build-on' and 'build-for' as arrays like '[amd64]' may not be standard charmcraft syntax (gold standard just uses 'amd64:' shorthand). Also 'optional' key on relation endpoints is noted as a CLAUDE.md guideline but is not a standard charmcraft field — this appears to be a fabricated/non-standard field for charmcraft.yaml relation definitions.
